title: SessionState
description: Runtime session state object. Created at session start, updated continuously, persisted at session end. The Session Orchestrator reads and writes this. All subsystems read from it. Backend-authoritative.

session_id.description: UUID for this session. Generated at start.

child_id.description: Reference to child profile. Never expose full profile in this object.

session_number.description: Lifetime session count for this child. First session = 1.

curriculum_state.description: Tracks what has been taught, what is active, and what remains.

active_items.description: Learning object IDs currently in rotation for this session.

confidence_score.description: Per-item confidence score. Drives question type routing.

modes_used.description: Interaction modes already used for this item this session. Mode Tracker uses this to ensure varied repetition.

attempts.description: Total attempts on this item this session.

consecutive_failures.description: Consecutive failures. Triggers Level 4 recovery at 2.

introduced_at_minute.description: Session minute when item was first introduced.

completed_items.description: Item IDs considered acquired in this session (confidence >= 76).

flagged_items.description: Item IDs removed from active rotation due to Level 4+ recovery. Pending reintroduction in different mode.

current_item_id.description: ID of the item currently being practiced.

current_question_type.description: Current position on question type ladder for current item.

session_plan.description: Ordered list of item IDs for this session (new + review). Set by Curriculum Engine at session start.

emotional_state.description: Tracks child's emotional and engagement state. Updated continuously by Emotional Engine.

recovery_level.description: Current recovery engine level. 0 = normal flow.

global_confidence_score.description: Rolling average of per-item confidence scores. Session-level indicator.

consecutive_successes.description: Count of consecutive correct responses. Drives streak escalation in rewards.

freeze_events_this_session.description: Count of NO_RESPONSE events. Tracks overall session difficulty.

emotional_shutdown_occurred.description: Whether Level 5 recovery was triggered this session.

state_estimate.description: Emotional Engine's current estimate of child state.

immersion_state.description: Tracks English-first rescue ladder state and L1 usage.

rescue_level.description: Current rescue ladder level. 0 = English only (default).

l1_events_this_session.description: Count of L1 uses this session (rescue ladder Level 4+).

l1_items.description: Item IDs for which L1 was used this session.

wait_time_state.description: Current state of wait time controller.

reward_state.description: Tracks reward delivery to prevent habituation and ensure variation.

last_reward_id.description: ID of most recently delivered reward. Next reward must differ.

timing_state.description: Tracks time-based triggers. Read by Session Orchestrator.

elapsed_seconds.description: Seconds since session start. Updated continuously.

last_novelty_injection_at_second.description: Session second when last novelty event was injected. Attention Engine uses this.

minutes_until_close.description: Time remaining before session close sequence triggers.

cost_state.description: Tracks resource usage for cost protection. Backend-enforced.

llm_calls_this_session.description: Count of LLM calls. Hard cap: 40.

tts_chars_this_session.description: Characters sent to TTS. Hard cap: 3000.

cost_cap_reached.description: If true: LLM calls disabled, session uses scripted-only mode.

open_loop_state.description: Ensures every session ends with an unresolved hook. [B]

has_open_loop.description: Session Orchestrator validates this is true before allowing session close.

open_loop_type.description: Which type of open loop was established.

open_loop_text.description: The actual preview text delivered to child.

recovery_history.description: Log of all recovery events this session. Used for session analysis and child profile update.

session_summary.description: Populated at session end. Persisted to child profile. Used for next session opening.

highlight_moment.description: LLM-generated one-sentence highlight for parent summary and next session callback. Example: '{name} learned to say CAT, DOG, and FISH today!'

emotional_arc.description: Overall session emotional tone for child profile update.

open_loop_text.description: The open loop delivered — used for next session opening callback.
